about.title: About IpHint
about.subtitle: The easiest way to monitor your content.

commonReality.title: Common Reality
commonReality.subtitle: Digital content, Fast to infringe, easy to steal.
commonReality.infoBoxBody: As social media and web platforms explode, tracking where and how your work is stolen has become virtually impossible. While only 3% of creators take action against infringement, the remaining 97% are left unprotected and exposed to theft.
commonReality.source: ipHint Internal Analysis Source: Global Image Theft Report & Internal Analysis

ourSolution.title: Our Solution
ourSolution.subtitle: Securing Brands and Creators Against Digital Risks
ourSolution.infoBoxTitle: Identify every modification with direct image data analysis.
ourSolution.infoBoxBody: In a sea of digital content, we provide the technical edge to secure your brand and creative rights.

ourService.title: Our Service
ourService.subtitle: Digital Content IP Protection & Monitoring Tool
bullets: Monitoring technology used to be an exclusive, high-cost service available only to large corporations.
Individual creators and small-to-medium brands have faced significant entry barriers in protecting their own rights.
Now, our scalable monitoring technology makes it possible to protect intellectual property regardless of your business size.
ourService.infoBoxTitle: top manual searches. Start protecting your work.
ourService.infoBoxBody: Our technology uses digital fingerprinting to detect even modified or altered content. With 24/7 automated monitoring, we alert you the moment infringement happens—keeping you one step ahead in securing your rights.
